name: Bug report
about: Something in an agent, playbook, script, or doc is wrong
title: "[BUG] <one-line description>"
labels: bug
---

## What's wrong

Which file / agent / playbook / script?

## Expected vs actual

What did you expect? What happened instead?

## Reproduce

Steps, commands, or the exact prompt you used.

## Environment

- Tool: (Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf / Copilot / Aider / OpenCode / other)
- OS:
